s-descrlineone: Here you **find** specific **categories** with which you can **configure** Leyno and **customize** it on your server, you can set up a **verification system** or **manage** your **tickets** with Leyno and much more.
leyno-descr: **Leyno** facilitates the **administration** and **moderation** of Discord servers.
la-descr: Leyno offers a **convenient** menu where users can choose from up to 12 **different** languages. Available **Languages** include German, English, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, Russian, Hindi, Latvian, Polish, Arabic and Chinese. This allows **users** to conveniently **set the desired **language** for an **optimal** Discord experience.**
se-descr: In the **Settings menu**, the user can adjust the **language** to ensure improved **understandability**. **Custom** messages can be configured to **personalize** the **system**. **Permissions** for the setup menu can also be configured so that only **authorized** people can change certain **settings**.
se-deletedescr: As soon as you click on **“Confirm”**, all **collected** data such as Role IDs, User IDs and Channel IDs will be immediately **deleted.** These **can** only be **created** by a **new** setup. Your **information** will be **completely** removed to protect your **privacy** and ensure **data security**.
setup-nopermsdescr: You do not have **sufficient** authorization for this **menu** if there is an **error** you should **Report** it to the server **owner**
s-joinsetupdescr: The menu provides comprehensive **join setup settings** for your Discord server. You can enable **AutoRole features** to automatically assign new **members** the appropriate **roles**. Additionally, you can set up **Welcome Messages** to give new **members** a warm welcome and inform them of **important** information. This is how you create a **welcoming** and structured community environment.
m-descr: The menu provides comprehensive **moderation settings** for your Discord server. You can set up a **ticket** and **log system** to **manage requests.** Regular **moderation checks** to **ensure a safe community environment.**
s-s-descr: The menu offers comprehensive ** security settings ** for your ** discord server. ** You can set up a ** verification system ** to control new ** members **. ** Regular ** Safety reviews ** and moderated chat ** ensure a safe community environment.
embedtitledescription: Enter the title you want the embed to have
embeddescriptioninfo: Enter the description that the embed should have
embedbuilder-imagedescr: Link must contain https:// if you don't want an image just enter something other than a link
embedbuilder-footerdescr: If you do not want the footer to be displayed, enter n (no). If you do, then enter y (yes).
a-setup-descr: In this ** menu ** you can set up an ** automatic autorole system **, in which new ** members ** is assigned a defined ** roll **.
a-chooseroledescr: In this ** menu ** you have to select a role for the ** autorole system **.
w-setup-descr: In this ** menu ** you can set up an ** automatic ** ** welcome system ** that shows new ** members ** how many ** members ** are on your ** discord server **.
w-setup-descr-choose: In this ** menu ** you have to select a channel for the ** welcome system **.
success-descr-a: The role %role% was selected and can now be used.
success-descr-w: The channel %channel% has been selected and can now be used.
del-w-descr: A previously furnished **setup** was **completely**. All associated ** configurations **, data and ** adjustments ** have been removed.
custommsg-descr: Here you can easily set up your ** individual ** messages.
log-descr: In this menu you can configure the **logging setup**. Here you specify which **actions** should be logged. This enables detailed tracking of **system events**, user activities or errors. Adjust the logging individually to your requirements and **security policies**.
log-descr2: In this menu you select the **channel** in which the logs are **displayed**. This **determines** where logged **actions** are sent. This way you can keep an eye on important **events** and ensure that all activities are clearly documented.
verify-descr: In diesem Abschnitt können Sie eine **Verifizierungsrolle**, eine Kategorie und einen Kanal festlegen. Diese **Einstellungen** helfen dabei, Ihren Discord-Server vor **unerwünschtem** Zugriff und potenziellen **Angriffen** zu **schützen**, indem sie eine gezielte **Kontrolle** über den Zugriff neuer **Mitglieder** ermöglichen. Schützen Sie Ihre **Community** effektiv.
